name: telegram-bot-codex
description: Expose the local coding agent as a private Telegram bot: guided token setup, zero-dependency bridge, live presence, deterministic access gate with tiers, QR onboarding.

interface.shortDescription: Your coding agent as a private Telegram bot
interface.longDescription: Guides bot token creation with BotFather, runs a zero-dependency bridge with live typing and status presence, gates strangers behind owner approval buttons, and onboards via a QR claim link.
defaultPrompt: Set up the telegram bot so I can chat with you from my phone.
